mano_cua.result_summary: 点击select下拉框时页面滚动位置保持稳定(Scroll Y 833不变)，下拉框正常打开并可选择选项。注意：初次点击编辑器获焦时有333px跳跃，但非目标bug场景。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Clicking select element kept Scroll Y stable at 833. Dropdown opened normally, selected January successfully. Initial editor click caused 333px scroll jump but this is not the target bug scenario.
